---
title: "Building a survey instrument"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Building a survey instrument}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
library(surveyframe)
```

This vignette builds a small instrument using only local R objects.

```{r instrument}
agree5 <- sf_choices(
  "agree5",
  1:5,
  c("Strongly disagree", "Disagree", "Neutral", "Agree", "Strongly agree")
)

i1 <- sf_item("sat_1", "The service was reliable.",
  type = "likert", choice_set = "agree5", scale_id = "sat")
i2 <- sf_item("sat_2", "The service was responsive.",
  type = "likert", choice_set = "agree5", scale_id = "sat")
i3 <- sf_item("sat_3", "I would recommend the service.",
  type = "likert", choice_set = "agree5", scale_id = "sat")
scale <- sf_scale("sat", "Satisfaction", c("sat_1", "sat_2", "sat_3"))

instr <- sf_instrument("Service Survey",
  components = list(agree5, i1, i2, i3, scale))
validate_sframe(instr, strict = FALSE)
```

```{r save, eval = FALSE}
write_sframe(instr, "service-survey.sframe")
```
